script.code:
import com.evolveum.midpoint.notifications.api.events.ModelEvent import com.evolveum.midpoint.xml.ns._public.common.common_3.AssignmentType
if (!(event instanceof ModelEvent)) return false if (!event.isSuccess()) return false if (!event.isUserRelated()) return false if (!event.isAdd() && !event.isModify()) return false
def user = event.getRequesteeObject() if (user == null) return false
boolean tieneRol = user.getAssignment().any { AssignmentType a -> a.getTargetRef() != null && a.getTargetRef().getOid() == 'a0000000-0000-0000-0000-00000000ca11' } return tieneRol
